steps.title: Find the requested example
steps.content: The goal is to name a specific particle physicist whose work focuses on neutrinos. A general statement about neutrinos or particle physics will not satisfy an example request.

steps.title: Reject general statements
steps.content: Choice A describes neutrinos without naming a physicist. Choice C discusses neutrino research generally, and Choice D says particle physicists can study neutrinos without naming an individual. The remaining choice names Viktor M. Sokolov and connects him to neutrino oscillation research. The answer is B.
